modules.name: CMS.Websites
modules.purpose: Website channel management — web page CRUD, ACL permissions, URL routing, page publishing, scheduled publishing, recycle bin, visual builder, page templates, web page scopes, and domain management. Central module for page permission enforcement via WebPageAclPermissions (Display, Read, Create, Update, Delete, Synchronize).
publicInterfaces: WebPageAclPermissions — static constants: DISPLAY, READ, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, SYNCHRONIZE
WebPageAclPermissionConstants — SystemPermissions list, ImplicitPermissions (Display only)
WebsiteChannelUIPermissions — MANAGE_PERMISSIONS constant for ACL management UI permission
WebsiteConstants — WEBSITE_CHANNEL_APPLICATION_PREFIX, IndividuallyCheckedPermissions (READ, DISPLAY)
IWebPageAclRolePermissionEvaluator — evaluates ACL permissions per role
IObjectQueryAclPermissionExtender — extends object queries with ACL permission filtering
IWebPageAclManager — manages web page ACL entries
IWebPageAclRetriever — retrieves ACL data for web pages
IWebPageManager — core web page management operations
IWebPageItemsPublisher — publishes web page items
modules.permissionRelevance: primary — defines all web page ACL permission constants and core ACL evaluation infrastructure

modules.name: Kentico.Xperience.Admin
modules.purpose: Back-office administration UI — contains multiple sub-assemblies (Admin.Base, Admin.Websites, Admin.DigitalMarketing, Admin.DigitalCommerce, Admin.Headless) plus Client/ for front-end and Tests/.

subModules.purpose: Core admin framework — UI page framework, authorization, permission evaluation, form components, AIRA integration, content hub UI, role permissions UI, workspace authorization, and web page ACL permission interface.
publicInterfaces: IUIPermissionEvaluator — Evaluate(string permission) returns UIPermissionEvaluationResult
IWebPageAclPermissionEvaluator (internal) — Evaluate(webPageItemId, websiteChannelId, permission, evaluateChildPages) returns PermissionEvaluationResult
PermissionType enum — UI, Acl, Workspace
IWorkspacePermissionEvaluator — workspace-level permission checks

subModules.purpose: Website-specific admin UI — web page editing, content tab, URL management, ACL permission evaluator implementation, web page state management, page builder, permission management UI, and web page action permission evaluation.
publicInterfaces: WebPageAclPermissionEvaluator (internal) — implements IWebPageAclPermissionEvaluator; checks channel admin status, evaluates page+subtree permissions via ACL role lookups
WebPageCommandManagerBase (internal) — abstract base for web page commands (CreateNewVersion, Save, Publish, etc.)
ContentTab — page for editing web page structured content; checks WebPageAclPermissions.UPDATE
WebPageBase<T> — base class checking WebPageAclPermissions.READ; holds IWebPageAclPermissionEvaluator
WebPageItemActionPermissionEvaluator — evaluates per-action permissions on web pages using ACL evaluator
WebPagePermissions — permission management UI page

subModules.purpose: Digital marketing admin UI — email marketing, contact management admin pages.
Digital commerce admin UI — commerce-related admin pages.
Headless channel admin UI — headless channel management pages.
Front-end client code for admin UI (TypeScript/React packages).

modules.permissionRelevance: primary — implements permission evaluation and enforcement in admin UI

modules.name: CMS.Membership
modules.purpose: User authentication, role management, and application-level permission system. Defines SystemPermissions (View, Update, Create, Delete), ApplicationPermissionEvaluator, and the role-based permission infrastructure. Administrators bypass permission checks.
publicInterfaces: SystemPermissions — static constants: VIEW, UPDATE, CREATE, DELETE
IApplicationPermissionEvaluator — Evaluate(ApplicationPermissionEvaluationContext) returns bool; administrators auto-pass
ApplicationPermissionEvaluationContext — holds ApplicationName, PermissionName, User
IApplicationPermissionProvider — CRUD for application permission entries
modules.permissionRelevance: primary — defines SystemPermissions and the application-level permission evaluator

modules.name: CMS.Workspaces
modules.purpose: Workspace management — workspace-scoped data permissions (View, Create, Update, Delete, Synchronize), workspace permission configuration, and workspace data permission evaluation.
publicInterfaces: WorkspaceDataPermissions — static constants: VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, SYNCHRONIZE

IWorkspaceDataPermissionEvaluator — EvaluateApplicationPermission(permission, appIdentifier, user) for any workspace; EvaluateApplicationPermission(permission, appIdentifier, workspaceId, user) for specific workspace; EvaluateApplicationPermissionForRoles() for batch role checks
modules.permissionRelevance: primary — defines workspace-level permission constants and evaluation

modules.name: CMS.ContentEngine
modules.purpose: Content item management — content types, content folders, content item CRUD, content language management, content item assets, content queries, and channel permission evaluation.
publicInterfaces: IDynamicChannelPermissionEvaluator — evaluates permissions dynamically based on channel context
IContentItemManager — CRUD operations for content items

modules.name: CMS.ContentWorkflowEngine
modules.purpose: Content workflow management — workflow steps, roles, notifications, and permission evaluation per content type (Website, Headless, Email, Reusable).
publicInterfaces: IContentTypePermissionEvaluator — evaluates permissions for workflow notification recipients by content type
IWorkflowStepChangeRecipientsPermissionEvaluator — determines valid recipients based on permission checks

modules.name: CMS.ContentSynchronization
modules.purpose: Content synchronization between environments — sync operations, dependency discovery, permission checks for sync operations.
publicInterfaces: ISynchronizationPermissionEvaluator — evaluates sync permissions
INodePermissionEvaluator — evaluates node-level permissions for sync operations
WebPageItemNodePermissionEvaluator — web-page-specific sync permission checks

modules.name: CMS.Core
modules.purpose: Foundation module — IoC container, service registration, module discovery, attribute-based registration. No external project references (root dependency).
publicInterfaces: RegisterImplementation attribute — IoC registration
Service — static service locator

modules.name: CMS.Base
modules.purpose: Base infrastructure — application lifecycle, contexts, events, handlers, collections, configuration, read-only mode, metadata.

modules.name: CMS.DataEngine
modules.purpose: Data access layer — object/info providers, SQL generation, queries, data classes, caching, and database operations.

modules.name: CMS.Modules
modules.purpose: Module registration and management — ResourceInfo, ModuleInfo providers.

modules.name: CMS.Headless
modules.purpose: Headless channel management — headless items, tokens, queries, and events.

modules.name: Kentico.*.Web.Mvc
modules.purpose: MVC web layer — 14+ projects for ASP.NET Core MVC integration including content delivery, membership, online marketing, page builder, visual builder, headless (GraphQL), and shared admin modules. Includes PagePermissionsChecker and FormPermissionsChecker for live-site permission enforcement.

subModules.purpose: Main MVC content delivery — page builder, form builder, email builder, preview, security (page/form permission checking), content retrieval.
Core MVC infrastructure — routing, application startup, authorization filters, content sync authorization.
ASP.NET Core Identity integration with Xperience membership system.
Online marketing MVC integration — A/B testing, personalization.
Headless delivery API — GraphQL via HotChocolate.
Platform-level ASP.NET Core integrations — routing, middleware.

publicInterfaces: IPagePermissionsChecker — live-site page permission checking
IFormPermissionsChecker — form permission checking
CheckPagePermissionsAttribute — MVC filter attribute for page permission enforcement
modules.permissionRelevance: secondary — live-site permission checking via MVC attributes

modules.purpose: AI/ML features — AIRA AI functionality.

modules.purpose: Activity logging infrastructure — activity models, logging service, modifiers, validators, filters.

modules.purpose: Utility helpers — caching, validation, text processing, URL utilities. Contains PermissionException.

modules.purpose: File system abstraction — virtual file system, directory operations.

modules.name: CMS.LicenseProvider
modules.purpose: License key validation and management.

modules.name: CMS.MacroEngine
modules.purpose: Macro expression engine — macro evaluation, security, resolvers.

modules.name: CMS.MediaLibrary
modules.purpose: Media library management — media files, folders. Contains permission migration service.

modules.name: CMS.MigrationUtility
modules.purpose: Data migration from older Kentico versions.

modules.name: CMS.Notifications
modules.purpose: Notification infrastructure — in-app notifications, email notifications.

modules.name: CMS.OnlineForms
modules.purpose: Online forms (BizForms) — form definitions, submissions, data storage.

modules.name: CMS.OnlineMarketing
modules.purpose: Online marketing — A/B testing, personalization, web analytics.

modules.name: Resources
modules.purpose: Shared resources — localization strings, embedded assets.

modules.name: CMS.Routing.Web
modules.purpose: Web routing infrastructure — URL pattern matching, route registration.

modules.name: Samples
modules.purpose: Sample projects including APIExamples with PagePermissions sample code.
modules.permissionRelevance: minor — contains PagePermissions API example code

modules.name: CMS.Scheduler
modules.purpose: Task scheduling — scheduled tasks, recurring jobs.

modules.name: Tests

modules.name: Tools
modules.purpose: Development and build tools.

modules.name: CMS.WebFarmSync
modules.purpose: Web farm synchronization — multi-server cache invalidation and task distribution.

modules.name: Build
modules.purpose: Build infrastructure — API change tracking, API documentation generation, license verification, NuGet packaging, SQL data, and build utilities.

modules.purpose: License key generation tools — targets .NET Framework 4.8 (legacy).

modules.name: Internal Documentation
modules.purpose: Internal technical documentation — best practices, feature docs, implementation guides, and UI testing framework guides.

modules.name: Pipelines
modules.purpose: Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline definitions — 23+ YAML files covering build, test, deploy, code coverage, security scanning, and release workflows.

modules.name: Docker

modules.name: Infrastructure

componentRelationships.detail: Uses CMS.Websites ACL types and permission constants
Uses ApplicationPermissionEvaluator for UI permission checks
Uses WorkspaceDataPermissionEvaluator for workspace permission checks
Uses membership for role-based ACL evaluation
Uses content engine for content item management
WebsiteContentTypePermissionEvaluator checks page permissions for workflow notifications
WebPageItemNodePermissionEvaluator checks sync permissions for web pages
Uses workspace permissions for content access
Uses membership system for role-based workspace permission checks

permissionArchitecture.summary: Three-layer permission model: (1) Application-level permissions via SystemPermissions + ApplicationPermissionEvaluator (View, Update, Create, Delete), (2) Workspace-level permissions via WorkspaceDataPermissions + WorkspaceDataPermissionEvaluator (View, Create, Update, Delete, Synchronize), (3) Page-level ACL permissions via WebPageAclPermissions + WebPageAclPermissionEvaluator (Display, Read, Create, Update, Delete, Synchronize). Administrators bypass all checks. Channel admins bypass ACL checks for their channel.
evaluatorChain: IWebPageAclPermissionEvaluator — page-level ACL (Admin.Base interface, Admin.Websites implementation)
keyBehaviors: Channel admins bypass ACL checks for their channel
WebPageAclPermissions.DISPLAY is implicitly assigned to all roles
READ and DISPLAY are individually checked (IndividuallyCheckedPermissions)
Non-READ/DISPLAY permissions also require READ permission check
ACL permissions can be evaluated recursively on child pages (evaluateChildPages flag)
Permission results are cached per-request in WebPageAclPermissionEvaluator
ContentTab checks WebPageAclPermissions.UPDATE and sets FormEditMode.ReadOnly if denied
WebPageBase checks WebPageAclPermissions.READ as base page requirement
